_comment_1: This workflow fetches CDRs from the Netsapiens API and stores them in a database.
name: Domain weekday CDR to DB

nodes.name: Schedule Trigger (Tue–Sat 00:00)
nodes.notes:
Fires every weekday at midnight (00:00) server time.\nCron: 0 0 * * 1-5
When running on schedule the workflow uses whatever
DATE_START / DATE_END is set in the Configuration node.
For a daily run that always pulls the previous day only,
set DATE_START and DATE_END both to:\n  ={{ $now.minus({days:1}).toISO().substring(0,10) }}

parameters.jsCode:
// ============================================================
// Netsapiens CDR Field Mapper — Full field set
// Based on actual API v2 response from api.simplicityvoip.com
// ============================================================

const items = $input.all();
const mapped = [];

for (const item of items) {
  const raw = item.json;
  if (!raw['id'] && !raw['call-orig-call-id']) continue;

  // Type-safe coercers
  const str  = v => (v !== undefined && v !== null) ? String(v) : null;
  const int  = v => (v !== undefined && v !== null && v !== '') ? parseInt(v, 10) : null;
  const bool = v => (v !== undefined && v !== null) ? Boolean(v) : null;

  mapped.push({
    json: {

      // ── API identifiers ──────────────────────────────────
      cdr_id:                              str(raw['id']),          // root "id" field
      domain:                              str(raw['domain']),
      reseller:                            str(raw['reseller']),
      core_server:                         str(raw['core-server']),

      // ── Call identifiers ─────────────────────────────────
      call_orig_call_id:                   str(raw['call-orig-call-id']),
      call_parent_call_id:                 str(raw['call-parent-call-id']),
      call_parent_cdr_id:                  str(raw['call-parent-cdr-id']),
      call_term_call_id:                   str(raw['call-term-call-id']),
      call_through_call_id:                str(raw['call-through-call-id']),
      call_tag:                            str(raw['call-tag']),

      // ── Call basics ───────────────────────────────────────
      // NOTE: call-direction returns integer (1), not string
      call_direction:                      str(raw['call-direction']),
      call_routing_class:                  int(raw['call-routing-class']),
      call_routing_match_uri:              str(raw['call-routing-match-uri']),
      call_server_mac_address:             str(raw['call-server-mac-address']),

      // ── Datetimes ─────────────────────────────────────────
      call_start_datetime:                 raw['call-start-datetime']               ?? null,
      call_ringing_datetime:               raw['call-ringing-datetime']             ?? null,
      call_answer_datetime:                raw['call-answer-datetime']              ?? null,
      call_disconnect_datetime:            raw['call-disconnect-datetime']          ?? null,
      call_record_creation_datetime:       raw['call-record-creation-datetime']     ?? null,

      // ── Durations ─────────────────────────────────────────
      call_talking_duration_seconds:       int(raw['call-talking-duration-seconds']),
      call_total_duration_seconds:         int(raw['call-total-duration-seconds']),
      call_on_hold_duration_seconds:       int(raw['call-on-hold-duration-seconds']),
      call_disconnect_reason_text:         str(raw['call-disconnect-reason-text']),

      // ── Batch (multi-leg grouping) ────────────────────────
      call_batch_answer_datetime:          raw['call-batch-answer-datetime']        ?? null,
      call_batch_start_datetime:           raw['call-batch-start-datetime']         ?? null,
      call_batch_sequence_marker:          str(raw['call-batch-sequence-marker']),
      call_batch_total_duration_seconds:   int(raw['call-batch-total-duration-seconds']),
      call_batch_on_hold_duration_seconds: int(raw['call-batch-on-hold-duration-seconds']),
      call_leg_ordinal_index:              int(raw['call-leg-ordinal-index']),

      // ── Origination (caller) ──────────────────────────────
      call_orig_caller_id:                 str(raw['call-orig-caller-id']),
      call_orig_from_name:                 str(raw['call-orig-from-name']),
      call_orig_from_user:                 str(raw['call-orig-from-user']),
      call_orig_from_host:                 str(raw['call-orig-from-host']),
      call_orig_from_uri:                  str(raw['call-orig-from-uri']),
      call_orig_to_user:                   str(raw['call-orig-to-user']),
      call_orig_to_host:                   str(raw['call-orig-to-host']),
      call_orig_to_uri:                    str(raw['call-orig-to-uri']),
      call_orig_request_user:              str(raw['call-orig-request-user']),
      call_orig_request_host:              str(raw['call-orig-request-host']),
      call_orig_request_uri:               str(raw['call-orig-request-uri']),
      call_orig_pre_routing_uri:           str(raw['call-orig-pre-routing-uri']),
      call_orig_match_uri:                 str(raw['call-orig-match-uri']),
      call_orig_ip_address:                str(raw['call-orig-ip-address']),
      call_orig_domain:                    str(raw['call-orig-domain']),
      call_orig_reseller:                  str(raw['call-orig-reseller']),
      call_orig_department:                str(raw['call-orig-department']),
      call_orig_site:                      str(raw['call-orig-site']),
      call_orig_user:                      str(raw['call-orig-user']),

      // ── Termination (called party) ────────────────────────
      call_term_caller_id:                 str(raw['call-term-caller-id']),
      call_term_to_uri:                    str(raw['call-term-to-uri']),
      call_term_match_uri:                 str(raw['call-term-match-uri']),
      call_term_pre_routing_uri:           str(raw['call-term-pre-routing-uri']),
      call_term_ip_address:                str(raw['call-term-ip-address']),
      call_term_domain:                    str(raw['call-term-domain']),
      call_term_reseller:                  str(raw['call-term-reseller']),
      call_term_department:                str(raw['call-term-department']),
      call_term_site:                      str(raw['call-term-site']),
      call_term_user:                      str(raw['call-term-user']),

      // ── Through / transfer leg ────────────────────────────
      call_through_action:                 str(raw['call-through-action']),
      call_through_caller_id:              str(raw['call-through-caller-id']),
      call_through_uri:                    str(raw['call-through-uri']),
      call_through_domain:                 str(raw['call-through-domain']),
      call_through_reseller:               str(raw['call-through-reseller']),
      call_through_department:             str(raw['call-through-department']),
      call_through_site:                   str(raw['call-through-site']),
      call_through_user:                   str(raw['call-through-user']),

      // ── Audio relay ───────────────────────────────────────
      call_audio_codec:                     str(raw['call-audio-codec']),
      call_audio_relay_side_a_local_port:   int(raw['call-audio-relay-side-a-local-port']),
      call_audio_relay_side_a_remote_ip:    str(raw['call-audio-relay-side-a-remote-ip']),
      call_audio_relay_side_a_packet_count: int(raw['call-audio-relay-side-a-packet-count']),
      call_audio_relay_side_b_remote_ip:    str(raw['call-audio-relay-side-b-remote-ip']),
      call_audio_relay_side_b_packet_count: int(raw['call-audio-relay-side-b-packet-count']),

      // ── Video relay ───────────────────────────────────────
      call_video_codec:                     str(raw['call-video-codec']),
      call_video_relay_side_a_local_port:   int(raw['call-video-relay-side-a-local-port']),
      call_video_relay_side_a_remote_ip:    str(raw['call-video-relay-side-a-remote-ip']),
      call_video_relay_side_a_packet_count: int(raw['call-video-relay-side-a-packet-count']),
      call_video_relay_side_b_remote_ip:    str(raw['call-video-relay-side-b-remote-ip']),
      call_video_relay_side_b_packet_count: int(raw['call-video-relay-side-b-packet-count']),

      // ── Fax relay ─────────────────────────────────────────
      call_fax_codec:                       str(raw['call-fax-codec']),
      call_fax_relay_side_a_local_port:     int(raw['call-fax-relay-side-a-local-port']),
      call_fax_relay_side_a_remote_ip:      str(raw['call-fax-relay-side-a-remote-ip']),
      call_fax_relay_side_a_packet_count:   int(raw['call-fax-relay-side-a-packet-count']),
      call_fax_relay_side_b_remote_ip:      str(raw['call-fax-relay-side-b-remote-ip']),
      call_fax_relay_side_b_packet_count:   int(raw['call-fax-relay-side-b-packet-count']),

      // ── Intelligence / sentiment ──────────────────────────
      call_intelligence_job_id:             int(raw['call-intelligence-job-id']),
      call_intelligence_percent_positive:   int(raw['call-intelligence-percent-positive']),
      call_intelligence_percent_neutral:    int(raw['call-intelligence-percent-neutral']),
      call_intelligence_percent_negative:   int(raw['call-intelligence-percent-negative']),
      call_intelligence_topics_top:         str(raw['call-intelligence-topics-top']),
      ending_sentiment:                     int(raw['ending_sentiment']),

      // ── Disposition ───────────────────────────────────────
      call_disposition:                    str(raw['call-disposition']),
      call_disposition_direction:          str(raw['call-disposition-direction']),
      call_disposition_notes:              str(raw['call-disposition-notes']),
      call_disposition_reason:             str(raw['call-disposition-reason']),
      call_disposition_submitted_datetime: raw['call-disposition-submitted-datetime'] ?? null,

      // ── Billing ───────────────────────────────────────────
      call_account_code:                   str(raw['call-account-code']),

      // ── Trace / debug links ───────────────────────────────
      prefilled_trace_api:                 str(raw['prefilled-trace-api']),
      prefilled_transcription_api:         str(raw['prefilled-transcription-api']),

      // ── Flags ─────────────────────────────────────────────
      hide_from_results:                   int(raw['hide-from-results']),
      is_trace_expected:                   bool(raw['is-trace-expected'])
    }
  });
}

if (mapped.length === 0) {
  return [{ json: { _skipped: true, reason: 'No CDRs returned for this date range' } }];
}

return mapped;

Used to create Table/Database columns to accommodate date returned by API.
